scripts.serve:lab1: concurrently -k -n student,course,enrollment,academe -c cyan,green,magenta,yellow "cd lab1/microservices/student-service && php artisan serve --port=8001" "cd lab1/microservices/course-service && php artisan serve --port=8002" "cd lab1/microservices/enrollment-service && php artisan serve --port=8003" "cd lab1/academe && php artisan config:clear && php artisan serve --port=8000"
scripts.serve:lab2: concurrently -k -n student,course,enrollment -c cyan,green,magenta "cd lab2/services/student-service && php artisan serve --port=8001" "cd lab2/services/course-service && php artisan serve --port=8002" "cd lab2/services/enrollment-service && php artisan serve --port=8003"
